evidence_gaps: No OpenAlex records returned; topic coverage from arXiv + crossref + GitHub only, and several crossref entries lack abstracts/years, reducing depth assessment.
No dedicated public benchmark dataset (e.g., ShipsEar, DeepShip) was returned by the tools; student must locate ship-radiated noise corpora externally.
No traditional ML baselines (SVM, Random Forest) on underwater acoustic data were surfaced; only deep learning papers appear.
GitHub repos with 0 stars (Shipsense-AI, oceanvue, DeepSound, marine-acoustic-classification) lack maintenance signal and may not be reproducible.
